prompt: 我的 feature 分支已经开发几天了，怀疑主分支已经有新的改动我没拉下来。请扫描状态告诉我当前分支是否落后 upstream，并提示我是否需要 git pull。注意项目可能有 detached HEAD 或 shallow clone 场景需要处理。

assertions.text: Detects upstream via git rev-parse @{u} BEFORE calling rev-list --count
Reports current_branch.ahead and current_branch.behind when upstream exists
Handles missing upstream with reason: no_upstream instead of exit error
Handles shallow clone with --is-shallow-repository or .git/shallow fallback
Recommends git pull when behind >= 5 (branch_behind_upstream rule)
Reads FETCH_HEAD age with git log --format=%cr (cross-platform, not stat)
